memoryArtifacts.headline: Kilchurn Castle was built in the mid-1400s, and it remained the base of the mighty Campbells of Glenorchy for 150 years. After the first Jacobite Rising of 1689, Kilchurn was converted into a garrison stronghold, but was abandoned by the end of the 1700s.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe於1344年1月出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow34歲，母親Mary Isabella Lamont26歲。他與Mariota Margaret Campbell在蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年5月2日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年69歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe于1344年1月出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow34岁，母亲Mary Isabella Lamont26岁。他与Mariota Margaret Campbell在苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年5月2日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍享年69岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Colin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Diminutive form of the medieval name Col(le), a short form of Nicholas . The medieval name died out after the 14th century. In the 19th century Colin was reintroduced to England from Scotland, where it is an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Cailean, particularly favoured among the Campbells and the MacKenzies, which relates to St Columba ( see Callum ) as Crìsdean does to Christ and Moirean to Mary.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe was born in January 1344, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, was 34 and his mother, Mary Isabella Lamont, was 26. He married Mariota Margaret Campbell in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 May 1413, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe est né en janvier 1344, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary Isabella Lamont, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mariota Margaret Campbell à Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1413, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe è nato il nel gennaio 1344 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mary Isabella Lamont, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mariota Margaret Campbell nel Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1413, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochaweが1344年1月にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochowは34歳，母Mary Isabella Lamontは26歳であった。スコットランドペルスシュアイアでMariota Margaret Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年5月2日にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで69歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルムンキルムン パーイッシュ チャーチ アンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe(이)가 1344년 1월 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Isabella Lamont(은)는 26세였다. 그는 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Mariota Margaret Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 5월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe nasceu em janeiro de 1344, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mary Isabella Lamont, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariota Margaret Campbell em Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1413, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Kilmun Parish Church and Cemetery Kilmun: килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Ardkinglass, Lochgoilhead, Argyllshire,: ардкинглас хоус, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe родился январь 1344 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Isabella Lamont, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariota Margaret Campbell в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 мая 1413 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe nació en enero de 1344, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mary Isabella Lamont, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mariota Margaret Campbell en Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1413, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
